sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Mawhna lo lai a ahoih teng buhlom,
A kaikhawm ding an late koi ah om;
Nasepna dingin
thuman phiaukawi keng,
Kuamah khawl lo ding an lak khit mateng.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: An late kawh om,
kua hong kuan nuam?
An lak pawi sung ah kua hong lungdam khawm nuam?
Kua’n hong khoppih
ding, buhlom hoih teng,
Mawhna lo sunga om buhlom teng.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Zawi neu zong zui-in zongin
pha takpi,
Lopa a sau hang buh om thei ding hi;
Lam lian zong zui inla nusiat nei
ke’n,
Vantung innpi sung hong tum khin uh hen.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lo teng khempeuh ah an min
khinta hi,
Leitung khempeuh in lak ding bek ngak hi;
Ahih hang a la ding tawm lak ding
tam,
La mengmeng kei leng lah a sia ding tam.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Tua ahih ciang hong pai un phiaukawi
tawh,
Anpha kaikhawm un, no mihingte aw;
An nei Topa hong pai mateng sem un,
Tua ciang anlak
pawi-ah lungdam khawm un.
